name: List Products on eBay
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To list products on eBay, they must have a rules template assigned to them. The rules template has all the settings needed to tell eBay how the product should be listed."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Assign Rules Templates to Products"}], "data-id": "assign-rules-templates-to-products"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To get your listings live on eBay you must apply your listing rules templates which can either be done "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/781-list-products-on-ebay#individually", "children": [{"text": a Listing Rules Template", "bold": true}, {"text": " and press "}, {"text": "Add a New Listing", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Via Import"}], "data-id": "via-import"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Listing rules templates can be assigned to products in bulk using the import system. The only required fields in your CSV import file are:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "SKU", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "eBay Items List", "bold": true}, {"text": " (the ID of the rules template)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Use the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/501-product-export-wizard#simple-export", "children": [{"text": "simple export"}]}, {"text": " process to generate a CSV file with your product SKUs."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The following additional fields can also be imported to the "}, {"text": "eBay Items List", "bold": true}, {"text": " field as a "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Delimiter-separated_values", "children": [{"text": "pipe (|) delimited string"}]}, {"text": ". This is only required if you want to define eBay category or listing design template details on a per product basis, rather than having them determined by the listing rules template or category mapping. Each field, however should end in a semicolon (;) to denote the end of the record."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Design Template ID", "bold": true}, {"text": " - your eBay listing template design ID"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "eBay Category 1", "bold": true}, {"text": " - the primary eBay category ID"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "eBay Category 2", "bold": true}, {"text": " - the secondary eBay category ID (incurs an additional charge)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "eBay Store Category 1", "bold": true}, {"text": " - your primary eBay store category ID"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "eBay Store Category 2", "bold": true}, {"text": " - your secondary eBay store category ID"}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "You must use numeric IDs for the eBay category and eBay store categories, not eBay category names."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once you have populated your CSV file with data you can begin the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/668-product-import-wizard", "children": [{"text": "import process"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Ensure "}, {"text": "Ebay Items List", "bold": true}, {"text": " is selected from the second database field name field. Map your template ID to this field."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": Products Only", "bold": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "Add New / Update Existing Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " from the "}, {"text": "How Do You Want To update your Database", "bold": true}, {"text": " dropdown."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Within the "}, {"text": "Other Options", "bold": true}, {"text": " section, select "}, {"text": "Replace Existing Record", "bold": true}, {"text": " from the "}, {"text": "eBay Items Update Options", "bold": true}, {"text": " dropdown."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This means that if the product already has a rules template applied to it, a second won't be added and instead the original will be removed first."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": string using the "}, {"text": "Join To", "bold": true}, {"text": " feature in the field mapping to link different columns in your file together. e.g"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Listing Template ID]|[Design Template ID]|[eBay Category 1]|[eBay Category 2]|[eBay Store Category 1]|[eBay Store Category 2]", "code": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "It also uses the "}, {"text": "Static Value", "bold": true}, {"text": " function to insert the pipe (|) separators, and the semicolon (;) to indicate the end of the record."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", On the update options tab, set it to Update Existing Products Only. Click the advanced options and set the "}, {"text": "eBay Items Update Options", "bold": true}, {"text": " to Replace Existing Record."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "List Variation Products"}], "data-id": "list-variation-products"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To list variation products on eBay via Neto, you need to have:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "A valid "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1354-add-variation-products", "children": [{"text": "variation product in Neto"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/786-ebay-categorisation-listing-rules#listing-rules", "children": [{"text": "A listing rules template configured to list variation products"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A variation product consists of a parent product, and one or more child products. The parent acts as a container for the child products, and it is the parent that gets assigned a listing rules template, and listed to eBay."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Certain eBay categories don't allow variation products. This may mean you need to assign a specific webstore category or update your "}, {"text": "category mapping"}, {"text": " to be valid. Refer to eBay's guide on variation products "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://pages.ebay.com.au/help/sell/listing-variations.html#categories", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"text": "."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once you have created a variation product you can then configure listing rules templates to list them on eBay, separate from regular listings. Standard products cannot be listed on a rules template configured for variations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Because of this, the easiest way to create a listing rules template for your variation products is to clone an existing template that is in use for regular products."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Listing rule templates", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Clone", "bold": true}, {"text": " button (on the right-hand side of the page) next to the template you wish to clone. This copies all the existing Listing Rules template settings, including shipping, field mapping and specifics."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": include the word "}, {"text": "variation", "code": true}, {"text": " (or similar), to differentiate the template is for variation products."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "}, {"text": "Variation Listing Template", "bold": true}, {"text": " checkbox."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This listing rules template can now be assigned to products to be listed on eBay, as well as existing listings so that they can be revised through Neto."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Link Products to Active eBay Listings"}], "data-id": "link-products-to-active-ebay-listings"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "It is essential your active eBay listings match up to product SKUs in Neto. If they do not then your orders will not link up correctly when they get imported as the eBay listings will not have a linked product. Another issue you may have is if you import data from another site but do not use the product SKU as your eBay custom labels, then there is no way eBay listings will automatically match up to your products. The solution around these issues is to assign products in Neto to active listings either per product or in bulk on eBay. Note that if you are simply importing products from eBay and do not need to link up to existing SKUs, Neto will automatically create the products with a uniquely generated SKU, or whatever you use as the eBay custom label."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Link Listings Per Product"}], "data-id": "link-listings-per-product"}, {"type": "ol", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "Listing ID", "bold": true}, {"text": " number of the listing you are changing"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "At the bottom of the page select "}, {"text": "Search Products By Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " section and type in the name or SKU of the product you wish to link to this listing, and select the product."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Rather than linking listings to products on an individual basis you can update the listings in your eBay account, and add a "}, {"text": "Custom Label", "bold": true}, {"text": " that matches the product "}, {"text": "SKU", "bold": true}, {"text": " in Neto."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Log into your "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " account and go to your "}, {"text": "Active", "bold": true}, {"text": " listings."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You should see a column for each of the listings called "}, {"text": "Custom Label", "bold": true}, {"text": ". If you don't see this, click "}, {"text": "Customise", "bold": true}, {"text": " and check the corresponding box."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": and change it to match your product SKU."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To sync this data with the listings in your Neto control panel, navigate to "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Active Listings", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Change the "},
